name: agent-learning-loop
description: Declarative spec for the evolutionary learning loop run at the end of an /agileteam session (or any substantial workspace session). This is a PROTOCOL document, not a self-executing hook: Claude Code does not auto-run skills on session end. It is executed by the assistant when working in this workspace and at the end of Phase 4 of the /agileteam command, per the rules mirrored in CLAUDE.md.

enforcement.note: For a hard, harness-enforced trigger, add a Stop/SessionEnd hook in settings.json (see the `update-config` skill). Without that, this loop runs because CLAUDE.md instructs the assistant to run it.

when: After the /agileteam DoD gate is cleared (Phase 4).
Before ending a session in which substantial implementation/review work happened.

inputs: git diff of the session (staged + committed changes)
test failures and QA run output
findings returned by the code-reviewer subagent (recurring smells, rejected diffs)
error patterns from logs / failed commands
refactor loops (tasks that needed multiple coder<->reviewer iterations)
analysis.output: A short list of concrete, recurring failure patterns with a proposed process rule for each.

interactive_gate.description: Modifications to skills, agent prompts, or CLAUDE.md are NEVER written automatically. The assistant must present a structured preview and get explicit per-item approval.
preview_format: Gefundenes Fehlermuster: <e.g. Fehlende TypeScript-Typen vor Implementierung>
Vorgeschlagene permanente Optimierung in <Ziel: CLAUDE.md | Agent-Prompt | neuer Skill>: <konkreter Regel-Vorschlag>
Möchtest du diese Verbesserung permanent für zukünftige Sessions implementieren? (y/n)
interactive_gate.approval: per-item (y/n); 'n' discards that item, nothing is written

A_local.use_for: project-specific coding guidelines / conventions learned this session

B_global_agents.use_for: cross-session improvements so the dev/QA subagents act smarter next time
B_global_agents.caution: Edits global shared config; always show the exact diff before writing. Re-run ./build-explorer.sh afterwards to refresh agent-explorer.html.

C_new_skill.use_for: a genuinely new, reusable capability that does not fit an existing agent or CLAUDE.md rule

safety: Never write to shared/global config (~/.claude/agents, ~/.claude/skills) without explicit per-item 'y'.
Show the exact diff/content before writing.
Prefer the narrowest level that fits (A before B before C).
Report honestly what was and was not applied.
